name: Metal Wire Laundry Basket with Fabric Liner - Brightroom™: Handcrafted Black Storage, Cotton Liner, 21.87" Length
description:
Save space and sort out laundry in style with the Metal Wire Laundry Basket with Fabric Liner from Brightroom™. Designed with metal, this laundry hamper features a wired design in a rectangle shape for easy placement on the floor or over a cabinet. Simply place it in your bathroom or near your washing machine to bring more convenience to your laundry time.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
